paragraphs.para_en: The International Conference on Public Instruction, convened in Geneva by the United Nations Educational, Scientific and Cultural Organization and by the International Bureau of Education, and having met there on July 6, 1953, in its sixteenth session, adopts on July 14, 1953, the following recommendation: The Conference,

paragraphs.para: Considérant les besoins résultant de l'extension de la scolarité obligatoire, dont il est traité dans la Recommandation n° 32 concernant la scolarité obligatoire et sa prolongation qu'elle a adoptée en 1951,

paragraphs.para_en: Considering the needs arising from the extension of compulsory schooling, as addressed in Recommendation No. 32 concerning compulsory schooling and its extension, adopted in 1951,

paragraphs.para: Considérant que les enfants de tous les pays ont le droit d'être instruits et éduqués par des maîtres présentant toutes garanties tant du point de vue physique, psychique et moral que de celui de la formation intellectuelle et pédagogique,

paragraphs.para_en: Considering that children in all countries have the right to be taught and educated by teachers who provide all necessary assurances from the physical, psychological, and moral perspectives, as well as in terms of intellectual and pedagogical training,

paragraphs.para: Considérant que la formation professionnelle du maître primaire devra s'appuyer de plus en plus sur une solide culture générale du niveau requis pour l'accès aux études supérieures,

paragraphs.para_en: Considering that the professional training of the primary school teacher must increasingly be based on a solid general education of the level required for access to higher education,

paragraphs.para: Considérant qu'en dépit d'aspirations semblables, des pays dont la situation géographique, démographique et sociale comme l'évolution historique et culturelle peuvent être très différentes, se doivent d'apporter des solutions diverses aux problèmes de la formation du personnel enseignant primaire ;

paragraphs.para: Soumet aux Ministères de l'instruction publique des différents pays la recommandation suivante :
paragraphs.think: The tags 'POL_OTH' (Policy theme | Other policy theme) and 'SYST_OTHER' (Education system monitoring & evaluation | Other) are selected because the paragraph involves submitting a recommendation to ministries (policy action) and addressing systemic needs through stakeholder engagement (education system monitoring). Paragraph 18 is complemental as it directly addresses informing the same stakeholders (press, public opinion, etc.) about primary teacher education, aligning with the target's focus on stakeholder awareness.
paragraphs.para_en: Submits the following recommendation to the Ministries of Public Instruction of the various countries:

paragraphs.para: ORGANISATION ET ADMINISTRATION DE L'ENSEIGNEMENT NORMAL PRIMAIRE 1. L'évolution de l'éducation et l'extension de l'instruction scolaire exigent que l'enseignement normal primaire fasse l'objet d'une étude continue et qu'il s'adapte périodiquement aux circonstances nouvelles et aux besoins qui se font jour.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_INI (Initial education and training) and ISC_1 (Primary education) are selected because the paragraph focuses on primary teacher training and its adaptation to educational needs. Related paragraphs 11-13, 44, and 50 address administrative coordination (11), collaborative structures (12), teacher number assessment (13), pedagogical content (44), and practical training (50), all of which complement or support the target paragraph's themes of organization and adaptation.
paragraphs.para_en: ORGANIZATION AND ADMINISTRATION OF PRIMARY TEACHER TRAINING 1. The development of education and the expansion of schooling require that primary teacher training be the subject of continuous study and that it be periodically adapted to new circumstances and emerging needs.

paragraphs.para: 2. Etant donné la complexité croissante des problèmes relatifs à la formation pédagogique, il y a tout avantage à confier à une instance spécialisée qu'il s'agisse d'une direction générale, d'un département ou d'un service — la coordination des questions d'ordre administratif, financier et technique ayant trait à cette formation.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_PDEV (Professional development) and PEDAG_OTHER (Other pedagogy related issue) are selected because the paragraph emphasizes coordination of administrative/technical matters for pedagogical training, which directly relates to teacher professional development and broader pedagogy. Related paragraphs discuss specialized bodies (12), teacher numbers/training (13), institutional autonomy (15), subsidies for development (68), and mental hygiene (36/25), all of which are semantically connected to pedagogical training coordination.
paragraphs.para_en: 2. Given the increasing complexity of issues related to pedagogical training, it is highly beneficial to entrust a specialized body—whether a general directorate, department, or service—with the coordination of administrative, financial, and technical matters concerning this training.

paragraphs.para: 3. Pour la solution des problèmes qui sont de son ressort, cette instance spécialisée devra compter sur la collaboration d'organes consultatifs, où siégeront des représentants de la direction et du corps enseignant des établissements de formation pédagogique et des représentants des maîtres primaires en fonctions.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_OTHER and ACT_EDUC are selected because the paragraph emphasizes collaboration with teacher representatives and consultative organs, aligning with stakeholder focus on teachers and educators. Related paragraphs discuss teacher training (13,14,67), institutional autonomy (15), curriculum development (37), and professional development (70), which are all interconnected with the specialized body's role in teacher-related matters.
paragraphs.para_en: 3. For addressing the issues within its competence, this specialized body shall rely on the collaboration of consultative organs, which will include representatives from the administration and teaching staff of teacher training institutions as well as representatives of serving primary school teachers.

paragraphs.para: 4. Au nombre des tâches essentielles incombant à cette instance spécialisée, il convient de mentionner l'évaluation et la formation du nombre de maîtres primaires requis par l'extension de l'instruction scolaire, compte tenu des répercussions que peuvent avoir sur les effectifs du personnel enseignant le mouvement démographique, la prolongation de la scolarité obligatoire, la réduction du nombre maximum d'élèves confiés à chaque maître, les vacances d'emploi, etc.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_SUPP (Teacher supply and shortages) and T_INI (Initial education and training) are selected because the paragraph focuses on assessing teacher numbers influenced by demographic factors (supply) and training requirements (initial education). Related paragraphs discuss training plans (14), practical training (50), professional development (65), in-service training (66), and organizational roles (67), all complementing the target's focus on teacher training and supply.
paragraphs.para_en: Among the essential tasks assigned to this specialized body is the assessment and training of the number of primary school teachers required by the expansion of school education, taking into account the impacts that demographic trends, the extension of compulsory schooling, the reduction of the maximum number of pupils assigned to each teacher, teacher vacancies, and similar factors may have on teaching staff numbers.

paragraphs.para: 5. Là où l'obligation scolaire n'est pas encore généralisée, cette instance spécialisée sera chargée d'élaborer, en liaison avec les organes directement intéressés, des plans prévoyant des mesures immédiates et des mesures à long terme pour assurer la formation du nombre de maîtres primaires qu'exige l'application échelonnée de l'obligation scolaire; des plans semblables pourront être envisagés aux fins de réduire le plus rapidement possible le nombre des maîtres qui ne possèdent pas tous les titres requis.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_QUAL and T_SUPP are selected because the paragraph focuses on ensuring teacher qualifications (T_QUAL) and addressing shortages through training plans (T_SUPP). Related paragraphs provide supporting or complemental information: para 16 (collaboration in training), para 50 (practical training), para 62 (post-graduation contact), para 65 (professional development for underqualified teachers), and para 68 (funding for teacher associations).
paragraphs.para_en: 5. Where compulsory schooling is not yet universal, this specialized body shall be responsible for developing, in coordination with the directly concerned bodies, plans providing for immediate measures and long-term measures to ensure the training of the number of primary schoolteachers required by the phased implementation of compulsory schooling; similar plans may be considered for the purpose of rapidly reducing the number of teachers who do not possess all the required qualifications.

paragraphs.para: 6. Même là où elle est chargée d'organiser l'enseignement normal et de contrôler l'efficacité des établissements de formation pédagogique, l'instance spécialisée devra laisser aux établissements intéressés l'autonomie et la latitude qui sont nécessaires à la bonne marche de tout établissement, notamment en ce qui concerne les programmes et les méthodes.
paragraphs.think: Tags CUR_ORG and SYST_INST are selected because the paragraph emphasizes institutional autonomy in curriculum/methods (CUR_ORG) and monitoring/evaluation of pedagogical institutions (SYST_INST). Related paragraphs: 16 (complemental - internal organization autonomy), 17 (complemental - institutional resources), 50 (complemental - practical training), 67 (supporting - professional development oversight).
paragraphs.para_en: 6. Even where it is responsible for organizing teacher training and monitoring the effectiveness of pedagogical training institutions, the specialized body must grant the institutions concerned the autonomy and latitude necessary for the proper functioning of any establishment, particularly with regard to curricula and methods.

paragraphs.para: 7. La collaboration des professeurs et des élèves-maîtres pouvant largement contribuer à cette bonne marche, il est souhaitable que les uns et les autres puissent être associés aux responsabilités de l'organisation intérieure de leur établissement. — 159
paragraphs.think: Tags ACT_EDUC (Teachers and educators) and CUR_ORG (Organization and instructional time) are selected because the paragraph emphasizes collaboration between teachers and the internal organization of institutions. Paragraph 17 (funding for teacher training institutions) complements the discussion of organizational responsibilities (confidence 0.7). Paragraph 52 (training in diverse school environments) complements the collaboration theme by addressing practical experience (confidence 0.7).
paragraphs.para_en: 7. The collaboration of professors and student teachers can greatly contribute to the smooth running of the institution; it is therefore desirable that both be associated with the responsibilities of the internal organization of their establishment. — 159

paragraphs.para: 8. Quel que soit le mode de financement des établissements de formation pédagogique, les crédits affectés à cette formation doivent être suffisants pour disposer d'un nombre d'établissements proportionnel aux besoins en maîtres primaires, pour assurer à leurs professeurs des traitements convenables, pour pourvoir ces établissements de locaux réunissant les conditions matérielles et pédagogiques requises (y compris le logement des élèves, lorsque le régime d'internat est appliqué), pour les doter de l'équipement indispensable (bibliothèque, laboratoires, ateliers, terrains de sports, etc.), pour leur adjoindre, à titre organique, des écoles primaires d'application et pour assurer aux élèves-maîtres la gratuité des études ainsi que des bourses d'entretien convenables.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_INI and T_COND directly address teacher training and working conditions. INFRA_CLASS and INFRA_TLM cover classroom environments and teaching materials. Related paragraphs discuss funding awareness (18), training systems (19), university access (20), financial support (31), practical training (50), and professional development (69), all of which complement or support the target paragraph's focus on infrastructure, funding, and teacher support.
paragraphs.para_en: 8. Regardless of the mode of financing for teacher training institutions, the funds allocated to this training must be sufficient to maintain a number of institutions proportional to the needs for primary school teachers, to ensure appropriate salaries for their professors, to provide these institutions with premises that meet the required material and pedagogical conditions (including accommodation for students when a boarding system is in place), to equip them with essential resources (library, laboratories, workshops, sports fields, etc.), to organically attach practice primary schools, and to guarantee student teachers free tuition as well as adequate maintenance scholarships.

paragraphs.para: 9. Pour faciliter ce financement, il est souhaitable que la presse, l'opinion, les assemblées législatives et les instances chargées de répartir les crédits soient tenues informées de l'importance que revêt l'enseignement normal primaire.
paragraphs.think: Tags ISC_1 (Primary education) and ACT_EDUC (Teachers and educators) are selected because the paragraph explicitly mentions primary teacher education and involves stakeholders like legislative bodies and funding authorities. Related paragraphs discuss training systems (19), teacher recruitment (29), professional development (67), and facilities for teachers (69), all of which complement the target paragraph's focus on supporting primary education through stakeholder engagement.
paragraphs.para_en: 9. To facilitate this funding, it is desirable that the press, public opinion, legislative assemblies, and the bodies responsible for allocating credits be kept informed of the importance of primary teacher education.

paragraphs.para: 10. Parmi les différents systèmes de formation pédagogique (écoles normales avec ou sans internat, instituts pédagogiques de type intermédiaire, instituts universitaires ou facultés de pédagogie), chaque pays aura intérêt à porter son choix sur le ou les systèmes qui, tout en assurant une préparation aussi complète que possible, correspondent le mieux à sa structure géographique, à ses disponibilités financières et à ses possibilités de recrutement et de rétribution des maîtres — la formation des maîtres primaires dans un établissement de niveau supérieur constituant un idéal Jont il faut chercher à se rapprocher de plus en plus.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_INI (initial teacher training systems) and ISC_99 (multiple education levels) are selected because the paragraph discusses pedagogical training systems (T_INI) and higher-level institutions (ISC_99). Related paragraphs: 20 (supports ideal of university-level training), 21 (modifies by addressing diversity challenges), 22 (complements with equivalence requirements), 26 (supports by addressing training institution transformation), and 52 (complements with practical training environments).
paragraphs.para_en: 10. Among the various systems of pedagogical training (normal schools with or without boarding, intermediate-type pedagogical institutes, university institutes or faculties of pedagogy), each country will benefit from choosing the system or systems that, while ensuring the most comprehensive preparation possible, best correspond to its geographical structure, financial resources, and capabilities for recruiting and remunerating teachers — the training of primary school teachers in a higher-level institution constituting an ideal to which it is necessary to strive to draw ever closer.

paragraphs.para: 11. Il est souhaitable que soient accordées aux maîtres primaires toutes facilités pour poursuivre leurs études à l'université et que soit augmenté le nombre des facultés ou instituts de pédagogie, les titres conférés par ces établissements devant permettre aux intéressés d'exercer dans l'enseignement du second degré.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_INI and T_QUAL are selected because the paragraph focuses on initial education/training (T_INI) for primary teachers and qualification standards (T_QUAL) for secondary teaching. Related paragraphs: 69 (supporting) links to professional development facilities; 31 (complemental) addresses access to training; 24 (supporting) connects to qualification requirements for secondary education.
paragraphs.para_en: It is desirable that primary school teachers be granted every facility to pursue their studies at the university level and that the number of faculties or institutes of pedagogy be increased, with the qualifications awarded by these institutions allowing the holders to teach in secondary education.

paragraphs.para: 12. Sans contester que soit pleinement justifiée la coexistence, dans un même pays, de plusieurs systèmes de formation qui se différencient du point de vue des conditions et de l'âge d'admission, de la durée et du niveau des études, ainsi que de la valeur des titres conférés, il semble qu'une trop grande diversité de systèmes de formation présente certains inconvénients, notamment pour ce qui est de l'égalité des traitements des maîtres primaires en fonctions.
paragraphs.think: The paragraph discusses the negative impact of excessive training system diversity on teacher remuneration equality (T_COND). Related paragraphs address qualifications equivalence (22), training standards (24), admission criteria (33), and professional development for underqualified teachers (65), all of which connect to systemic factors affecting teacher working conditions.
paragraphs.para_en: 12. Without disputing that the coexistence, within the same country, of multiple training systems differing in terms of admission conditions and age, duration and level of studies, as well as the value of the qualifications awarded, is fully justified, it appears that an excessive diversity of training systems presents certain disadvantages, particularly concerning the equality of remuneration for serving primary school teachers.

paragraphs.para: 13. Là où il existe un système de formation distinct pour les maîtres ruraux et pour les maîtres urbains, il importe d'assurer, par l'équivalence du niveau des études, l'équivalence des titres qui sont conférés aux uns et aux autres.
paragraphs.think: The tags 'T_QUAL' (Teachers | Qualification and certification) and 'POP_RUR' (Learner population | Rural and remote learners) are selected because the paragraph explicitly discusses equivalence of qualifications for rural and urban teachers (T_QUAL) and specifically mentions rural teachers (POP_RUR). Paragraph 52 (para 43) is related as it addresses training in diverse school environments, which complements the target paragraph's focus on rural-urban teacher equivalence by emphasizing exposure to different settings. The complemental relation has moderate confidence (0.7) as both paragraphs address teacher training in varied contexts but from distinct angles.
paragraphs.para_en: 13. Where there exists a distinct training system for rural teachers and for urban teachers, it is essential to ensure, through the equivalence of the level of studies, the equivalence of the qualifications conferred upon each.

paragraphs.para: 14. Les maîtres qui se destinent à l'éducation préscolaire, à l'éducation des enfants déficients ou inadaptés (de préférence, après obtention d'un brevet spécial) ou à l'enseignement primaire supérieur ou complémentaire, doivent recevoir une formation spécialisée parallèlement à leur préparation d'ordre général ou en complément de celle-ci; il y aurait également intérêt à ce que les maîtres en fonctions puissent passer d'un type d'enseignement primaire à l'autre, après avoir reçu la formation spécialisée indispensable. — 160 -
paragraphs.think: Tags T_QUAL and T_INI are selected because the paragraph emphasizes specialized training and qualification requirements. CCUT_INCL applies due to mention of children with disabilities/special needs. ISC_1 is directly referenced as primary education. Related paragraphs 24/25 address training access and late-discovery of aptitude (complemental to initial training). Paragraphs 50/51 discuss practical training placements, which directly complement the specialized training requirement. Confidence scores reflect clear semantic connections.
paragraphs.para_en: 14. Teachers who intend to work in preschool education, in the education of children with disabilities or special needs (preferably after obtaining a special certificate), or in higher or supplementary primary education, must receive specialized training alongside their general preparation or as a complement to it; it would also be advantageous for serving teachers to be able to transfer from one type of primary education to another after receiving the necessary specialized training.

paragraphs.para: 15. Dans les pays où des études secondaires complètes ne sont pas exigées comme condition d'admission dans les établissements assurant la formation des maitres primaires, toutes facilités doivent être données aux bacheliers pour recevoir une formation pédagogique qui, en aucun cas, ne devrait être inférieure à celle qui est requise des élèves-maîtres ayant suivi la filière ordinaire.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_INI and T_QUAL are selected because the paragraph focuses on pedagogical training (initial education) and qualification standards for primary teachers. Related paragraphs: 25 (complemental - expands on access to training for different groups), 26 (modifying - addresses institutional transformation related to teacher training), 51 (complemental - discusses practical training components), and 62 (complemental - emphasizes ongoing institutional support for teachers).
paragraphs.para_en: 15. In countries where the completion of secondary education is not required as a condition for admission to institutions providing training for primary school teachers, all facilities must be made available to holders of the baccalaureate to receive pedagogical training which, under no circumstances, should be inferior to that required of trainee teachers who have followed the regular program.

paragraphs.para: 16. Toutes facilités doivent également être données aux personnes qui se découvriraient tardivement les aptitudes ou la vocation nécessaires au métier d'éducateur, pour recevoir ou compléter la formation générale et professionnelle indispensable à cette fonction.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_INI (Initial education and training) and O_All (Combined general and vocational) are selected because the paragraph emphasizes providing general and professional training for educators, aligning with initial education (T_INI) and the combination of general/vocational orientation (O_All). Paragraph 26 discusses transforming schools into pedagogical training institutions, which complements the target's focus on training facilities (confidence 0.7). Paragraph 39 explicitly mentions balancing general education and professional preparation, directly aligning with the target's combined training requirement (confidence 0.9).
paragraphs.para_en: Every possible facility must also be provided to individuals who discover late their aptitude or vocation for the profession of educator, to receive or complete the general and professional training indispensable to this role.

paragraphs.para: 17. Sans oublier les services que les écoles normales de niveau secondaire ont rendus, dans certains pays, en tant qu'écoles de culture générale ouvertes à tous, des mesures devraient être envisagées aux fins de transformer progressivement ces écoles en établissements de formation pédagogique essentiellement réservés à ceux et à celles qui pensent se consacrer à la carrière de l'enseignement.
paragraphs.think: Tags O_G (General academic education) and CUR_OTHER (curriculum-related transformation) are selected because the paragraph discusses secondary-level normal schools transitioning to pedagogical training institutions, which involves curriculum shifts. Paragraph 39 is complemental as it addresses balancing general education and professional preparation in secondary pedagogical training, directly relating to the transformation mentioned in the target paragraph.
paragraphs.para_en: 17. Without overlooking the services rendered by secondary-level normal schools, in certain countries, as general education institutions open to all, measures should be considered to gradually transform these schools into pedagogical training establishments primarily reserved for those who intend to pursue a career in teaching.

paragraphs.para: RECRUTEMENT ET CONDITIONS D'ADMISSION 18. Tout devra être mis en œuvre pour attirer vers la profession enseignante des candidats qui, possédant les aptitudes requises, pourraient être tentés de se vouer à d'autres activités; on ne saurait oublier toutefois que l'amélioration de la situation morale et matérielle du personnel enseignant primaire constitue le facteur décisif du succès de toute campagne de recrutement.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_RECR and T_COND are selected because the paragraph focuses on recruitment strategies (T_RECR) and improving working conditions (T_COND). Related paragraphs: 28 (complemental - gender equality in recruitment), 29 (supporting - teacher role in recruitment), 31 (supporting - financial incentives for recruitment), 32 (modifying - flexible commitments for trainees), 35 (complemental - admission criteria beyond intellectual aptitudes).
paragraphs.para_en: RECRUITMENT AND ADMISSION CONDITIONS 18. Every effort must be made to attract candidates to the teaching profession who, possessing the required aptitudes, might be tempted to devote themselves to other activities; however, it must not be forgotten that the improvement of the moral and material conditions of primary teaching staff constitutes the decisive factor in the success of any recruitment campaign.

paragraphs.para: 19. Les mêmes possibilités d'accès à la profession enseignante primaire doivent être assurées aux candidats des deux sexes.
paragraphs.think: The paragraph emphasizes equal opportunities for both sexes in primary teaching, aligning with T_STAT (Legal status and rights) as it addresses non-discrimination in professional access. Para 32 directly supports this by discussing flexible commitments to avoid hindering recruitment, especially for women. Paras 29 and 30 provide related recruitment strategies, functioning as complemental information.
paragraphs.para_en: 19. Equal opportunities for access to the primary teaching profession must be ensured for candidates of both sexes.

paragraphs.para: 20. L'attention des maîtres primaires et secondaires devrait être attirée fréquemment sur l'aide précieuse qu'ils peuvent apporter au recrutement des candidats à l'enseignement primaire, en dépistant les jeunes qui manifestent la possession des qualités nécessaires et en les encourageant, par des mesures appropriées, à embrasser cette carrière.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_RECR (recruitment) and POP_YOUTH (youth) are selected because the paragraph explicitly discusses teacher recruitment strategies targeting young people. Para 30 (21) is complemental with high confidence as it proposes vocational guidance offices as another recruitment method. Para 31 (22) is complemental with moderate confidence as it addresses financial incentives to broaden recruitment, which aligns with the target's focus on encouraging youth.
paragraphs.para_en: 20. Primary and secondary school teachers should be frequently reminded of the valuable assistance they can provide in recruiting candidates for primary education, by identifying young people who demonstrate the necessary qualities and encouraging them, through appropriate measures, to pursue this career.

paragraphs.para: 21. Les offices d'orientation professionnelle peuvent aussi collaborer utilement au recrutement des futurs membres du personnel enseignant primaire; comme ils le font déjà pour d'autres professions, ils pourraient éditer et diffuser des notices explicatives sur les modalités de la carrière de l'enseignement; dans le cadre de cette campagne, ils pourraient aussi organiser des causeries aux élèves qui vont quitter l'école, publier des articles dans la presse, préparer des émissions radiophoniques, etc.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_RECR (Teachers | Recruitment and hiring) and O_All (Education orientation | Combined general and vocational) are selected because the paragraph focuses on vocational guidance's role in recruiting primary teaching staff and providing career information. Related paragraphs: 31 (complemental - expands recruitment strategies), 57 (complemental - extracurricular involvement aligns with media outreach), and 47 (complemental - curriculum flexibility complements career guidance).
paragraphs.para_en: 21. Vocational guidance offices can also constructively assist in recruiting future primary teaching staff; as they already do for other professions, they could produce and distribute explanatory notices on the conditions of a teaching career; within the framework of this campaign, they could also organize talks for students about to leave school, publish articles in the press, prepare radio broadcasts, and so forth.

paragraphs.para: 22. Afin d'étendre le recrutement des candidats à tous les secteurs de la population, il est souhaitable d'accorder aux élèves-maîtres soit la gratuité complète des études (scolarité, logement et entretien), soit des bourses, soit un présalaire.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_RECR and T_INI are selected because the paragraph focuses on recruitment strategies (T_RECR) and initial education/training support (T_INI) for trainee teachers. Para 32 modifies the recruitment approach by adding conditions (commitment to teaching years). Para 71 complements by addressing professional development scholarships, which align with the target's mention of scholarships.
paragraphs.para_en: 22. In order to broaden the recruitment of candidates to all sectors of the population, it is desirable to grant trainee teachers either complete free tuition (including schooling, accommodation, and maintenance), scholarships, or a salary advance.

paragraphs.para: 23. Lorsque, en contrepartie des facilités matérielles accordées au cours de leurs études, on exige des élèves-maitres qu'ils s'engagent à exercer pendant un nombre d'années déterminé, cet engagement indispensable 161 doit être assez souple, surtout dans le cas du personnel féminin, pour ne pas constituer un obstacle au recrutement.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_RECR (Recruitment and hiring) and T_COND (Working conditions and salaries) are selected because the paragraph discusses recruitment challenges related to service commitments (T_RECR) and the flexibility of contractual terms affecting working conditions (T_COND). Paragraphs 33 and 34 are related as complemental: they address recruitment processes (admission criteria and qualification evaluation) which are connected to the broader theme of recruitment challenges mentioned in the target paragraph, though they focus on earlier stages of the recruitment pipeline.
paragraphs.para_en: 23. When, in return for the material facilities granted during their studies, trainee teachers are required to commit to practicing for a specified number of years, this essential commitment must be sufficiently flexible, especially in the case of female personnel, so as not to constitute an obstacle to recruitment.

paragraphs.para: 24. L'âge d'admission dans les établissements de formation pédagogique est fonction du niveau (secondaire, intermédiaire ou supérieur) de ces établissements; dans l'impossibilité où l'on est dé fixer une limite applicable à tous les pays, on ne saurait oublier les dangers que présente l'admission de candidats n'ayant pas la maturité d'esprit voulue pour pouvoir juger des responsabilités inhérentes à la carrière et faire face aux difficultés de celle-ci.
paragraphs.think: Tags ISC_23 (Secondary education unspecified) and PEDAG_OTHER (Other pedagogy related issue) are selected because the paragraph discusses admission criteria tied to educational levels (secondary, intermediate, higher) and emphasizes maturity requirements for teacher training, which falls under pedagogical considerations. Paragraph 35 complements the target by expanding on admission criteria beyond intellectual aptitudes, while paragraph 36 directly addresses mental characteristics and psychological assessments, both aligning with the target's focus on maturity and professional readiness.
paragraphs.para_en: 24. The age of admission to teacher training institutions depends on the level (secondary, intermediate, or higher) of these institutions; given the impossibility of setting a limit applicable to all countries, one must not overlook the risks posed by admitting candidates who do not possess the required maturity of mind to properly assess the responsibilities inherent to the profession and to face its challenges.

paragraphs.para: 25. La simplification des modalités d'admission apparaissant souhaitable, il convient de prendre en considération les qualifications, certificats et diplômes des candidats lors des examens d'admission auxquels ils sont soumis.
paragraphs.think: The tag T_QUAL (Qualification and certification) is selected because the paragraph emphasizes evaluating candidates' qualifications, certificates, and diplomas during admission exams, directly relating to teacher qualification standards. Paragraph 35 is complemental as it expands on admission criteria by discussing psychological exams and interviews, which together provide a broader context for assessing teacher trainees.
paragraphs.para_en: 25. As the simplification of admission procedures appears desirable, it is appropriate to take into account the qualifications, certificates, and diplomas of candidates during the entrance examinations to which they are subjected.

paragraphs.para: 26. Toutefois, les aptitudes et connaissances intellectuelles ne sauraient constituer le seul élément d'appréciation pour l'admission aux études normales: la force de caractère, les aptitudes physiques et psychiques, l'amour de l'enfance, l'esprit de dévouement, le sens social sont autant de critères dont il faut également tenir compte; c'est pourquoi il est souhaitable que des examens psychologiques soient organisés à l'intention des candidats aux études normales — immédiatement avant et durant ces études afin d'écarter ceux d'entre eux qui présenteraient des anomalies du caractère ou du comportement incompatibles avec l'exercice de la profession ; les entretiens avec les candidats aux fins de découvrir leur vocation pédagogique et, le cas échéant, les stages probatoires constituent un heureux complément aux examens d'admission.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_RECR (Recruitment and hiring) and PEDAG_OTHER (Pedagogy & assessment | Other pedagogy related issue) are selected because the paragraph focuses on admission criteria for teacher training (recruitment) and psychological/character assessments (other pedagogy issues). Related paragraphs discuss psychological training (36, 42), curriculum development (37), pedagogical focus (41), practical training (51), and staff selection (60), all of which complement the target paragraph's themes.
paragraphs.para_en: 26. However, intellectual aptitudes and knowledge should not constitute the sole criteria for admission to teacher training studies: strength of character, physical and mental aptitudes, love of children, dedication, and social awareness are all criteria that must also be taken into account; for this reason, it is desirable that psychological examinations be organized for candidates applying to teacher training—immediately before and during these studies—to exclude those who exhibit character or behavioral anomalies incompatible with the practice of the profession; interviews with candidates to ascertain their pedagogical vocation and, where applicable, probationary internships, constitute a valuable complement to admission examinations.

paragraphs.para: 27. Il convient aussi de tenir compte des caractéristiques mentales, de l'équilibre affectif, des préoccupations personnelles et des difficultés d'adaptation; il est donc désirable que tout établissement de formation pédagogique confie le soin de faire un cours d'hygiène mentale à un professeur, auquel les élèves-maîtres pourront également s'adresser pour résoudre leurs problèmes d'ordre personnel.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_INI (Initial teacher training) and PEDAG_OTHER (Other pedagogy issues) are selected because the paragraph focuses on mental hygiene courses in teacher training institutions (T_INI) and broader pedagogical aspects like mental characteristics and personal concerns (PEDAG_OTHER). Paragraph 54 is complemental (high confidence) as it directly addresses school hygiene courses, aligning with the mental hygiene focus. Paragraph 41 is supporting (moderate confidence) as it discusses psychological training for teachers, which overlaps with the paragraph's emphasis on mental characteristics and personal issues.
paragraphs.para_en: 27. Attention should also be given to mental characteristics, emotional balance, personal concerns, and adaptation difficulties; it is therefore desirable that every teacher training institution entrust the responsibility of conducting a course in mental hygiene to a professor, to whom trainee teachers may also turn for assistance in resolving their personal issues.

paragraphs.para: PLANS D'ÉTUDES 28. Des représentants de la direction et du corps enseignant des établissements de formation pédagogique et des représentants des maîtres primaires en fonctions devraient être associés à l'élaboration et à la révision des plans d'études et des programmes des établissements assurant la formation du personnel enseignant primaire.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_INI (Initial education and training) and CUR_IMPL (Curriculum implementation) are selected because the paragraph emphasizes stakeholder involvement in curriculum development for teacher training. ACT_EDUC (Stakeholder focus | Teachers and educators) applies due to the inclusion of representatives from administration, teaching staff, and teachers. Para 67 (relation: supporting) directly addresses professional development activities organized by stakeholders mentioned in the target paragraph. Para 70 (relation: complemental) discusses collaborative efforts for professional development, aligning with the target's focus on stakeholder engagement.
paragraphs.para_en: CURRICULUMS 28. Representatives of the administration and teaching staff of teacher training institutions, as well as representatives of serving primary school teachers, should be involved in the development and revision of curricula and programs at institutions responsible for the training of primary school teaching personnel.

paragraphs.para: 29. La durée des études dans les établissements de formation pédagogique dépend de la nature de l'enseignement qui y est donne; dans le cas où celui-ci embrasse la culture générale et la préparation professionnelle proprement dite, la durée des études devra nécessairement être plus longue.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_INI (Teachers | Initial education and training) and CUR_ORG (Curriculum | Organization and instructional time) are selected because the paragraph discusses teacher training duration and curriculum structure. Para 39 (balance between general and professional education) is complemental as it adds context about curriculum components affecting duration. Para 48 (practical training allocation) is modifying as it specifies how time is distributed within professional preparation, directly relating to the duration discussed.
paragraphs.para_en: 29. The duration of studies in teacher training institutions depends on the nature of the instruction provided; when this instruction encompasses both general education and professional preparation proper, the duration of the studies must necessarily be longer.

paragraphs.para: 30. Dans les établissements de formation pédagogique de niveau secondaire, il convient de réaliser un juste équilibre entre la culture générale et la préparation professionnelle. — 162 —
paragraphs.think: The tag 'O_All' (Education orientation | Combined general and vocational) is selected because the paragraph explicitly discusses balancing general education and professional preparation in pedagogical training. Paragraph 40 complements this by detailing specific professional preparation components (e.g., social facts, domestic economy), while paragraph 43 adds related general pedagogical subjects (e.g., general pedagogy, history of education), both expanding on the curriculum balance mentioned in the target paragraph.
paragraphs.para_en: 30. In secondary-level pedagogical training institutions, an appropriate balance should be achieved between general education and professional preparation.

paragraphs.para: 31. La préparation professionnelle proprement dite doit comprendre non seulement des études psychologiques et pédagogiques et la pratique de l'enseignement, mais aussi des cours spéciaux portant, par exemple, sur l'étude des faits sociaux, l'économie domestique, l'hygiène, l'éducation physique, le chant, le dessin, les travaux manuels, l'agriculture, etc.
paragraphs.think: Tags CUR_CONTENT and PEDAG_OTHER are selected because the paragraph emphasizes curriculum content (special courses on social facts, hygiene, etc.) and pedagogical studies (psychological/pedagogical training). Related paragraphs expand on these themes: 41/42/43/45/54/55 provide complementary details on pedagogical training, curriculum components, and social roles of teachers.
paragraphs.para_en: Professional preparation proper must include not only psychological and pedagogical studies and the practice of teaching, but also special courses dealing, for example, with the study of social facts, domestic economy, hygiene, physical education, singing, drawing, manual work, agriculture, etc.

paragraphs.para: 32. La formation psychologique et pédagogique du personnel enseignant primaire doit porter sur l'étude de la nature de l'enfant et de ses processus d'acquisition des connaissances, sur l'étude des rapports existant entre l'éducation et la société, sur l'étude de la didactique et du matériel éducatif — toutes ces questions étant envisagées du point de vue tant théorique que pratique.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_INI (initial teacher training) and PEDAG_FOUND (pedagogical foundations) are selected because the paragraph focuses on psychological/pedagogical training for teachers and foundational topics like child development, education-society relationships, and didactics. Related paragraphs address complementary aspects of teacher training (e.g., psychological studies, pedagogical curriculum components, practical training, and institutional requirements).
paragraphs.para_en: 32. The psychological and pedagogical training of primary school teaching staff must focus on the study of the nature of the child and their processes of knowledge acquisition, on the study of the relationships between education and society, and on the study of didactics and educational materials — all these matters being considered from both theoretical and practical perspectives.

paragraphs.para: 33. Les études psychologiques exigées des élèves-maîtres doivent porter sur la psychologie générale et sur la psychologie de l'enfant; loin de se limiter aux techniques des tests, elles doivent comprendre une étude qualitative de la structure de l'esprit de l'enfant et de son développement ; les cours oraux doivent être accompagnés d'observations et d'expériences réalisées par les élèves-maîtres sur le comportement de l'enfant du point de vue intellectuel et affectif, individuel et social.
paragraphs.think: Tags PEDAG_FOUND and PEDAG_OTHER are selected because the paragraph emphasizes pedagogical foundations (practical training structure) and broader pedagogy-related issues (exposure to diverse school environments). Relations are identified with confidence scores based on semantic alignment: para 49 directly supports practical training methods, para 51 complements the focus on varied placements, and paras 43-45 provide related pedagogical context.
paragraphs.para_en: 33. The psychological studies required of trainee teachers must cover general psychology and child psychology; far from being limited to test techniques, they must include a qualitative study of the structure of the child's mind and its development; the oral courses should be accompanied by observations and experiments conducted by the trainee teachers on the child's behavior from intellectual and emotional, individual and social perspectives.

paragraphs.para: 34. Dans le cadre des études pédagogiques, il est souhaitable de réserver une place à la pédagogie générale, à l'histoire de l'éducation et à la pédagogie comparée, à la pédagogie expérimentale, à la didactique des différents enseignements, à l'organisation, à l'administration et à la législation scolaires, enfin aux problèmes d'ordre pédagogique propres au pays considéré.
paragraphs.think: Tags POL_CUR and PEDAG_FOUND are selected because the paragraph discusses curriculum structure (POL_CUR) and foundational pedagogical subjects (PEDAG_FOUND). Related paragraphs 44, 45, and 47 address complementary aspects of curriculum content (didactics, optional courses) and pedagogical foundations, establishing clear semantic connections.
paragraphs.para_en: 34. Within the framework of pedagogical studies, it is desirable to allocate a place to general pedagogy, the history of education, and comparative pedagogy, to experimental pedagogy, to the didactics of various subjects, to the organization, administration, and school legislation, and finally to the pedagogical issues specific to the country in question.

paragraphs.para: 35. L'enseignement de la pédagogie générale et de l'histoire de l'éducation doit tendre à faire saisir aux futurs maîtres, outre les constantes que l'on note dans les différentes théories pédagogiques, l'évolution qui s'est produite tant du point de vue des principes que de celui de l'organisation de l'école; la pédagogie comparée doit leur inculquer la notion de l'universalité de certains problèmes éducatifs, en même temps que leur faire ressentir le besoin d'adapter les principes généraux aux conditions spéciales de chaque milieu national, régional et local.
paragraphs.think: Tags PEDAG_FOUND and O_G are selected because the paragraph focuses on pedagogical foundations (theories, evolution of principles) and general academic education orientation. Related paragraphs discuss teaching methods (45), seminar-based training (46), practical training in diverse settings (51, 52, 49), which complement the theoretical framework of para 44. Relations are complemental as they expand on practical implementation and contextual adaptation.
paragraphs.para_en: 35. The teaching of general pedagogy and the history of education should aim to enable future teachers to grasp, in addition to the constants observed in various pedagogical theories, the evolution that has occurred both in terms of principles and in the organization of schooling; comparative pedagogy should instill in them the notion of the universality of certain educational issues, while also making them aware of the need to adapt general principles to the specific conditions of each national, regional, and local context.

paragraphs.para: 36. Dans les plans d'études, une place importante doit être réservée à l'enseignement de la didactique, tant du point de vue des méthodes actives que de celui des diverses disciplines, et en particulier à la méthodologie de la lecture, de l'écriture et de l'initiation mathématique; cet enseignement méthodologique doit être donné en étroite corrélation avec les cours de psychologie et avec la pratique de l'enseignement.
paragraphs.think: Tags PEDAG_METHO and CUR_IMPL are selected because the paragraph emphasizes teaching methods (didactics, active methods) and curriculum implementation (correlation with psychology and teaching practice). Related paragraphs 46, 48, 49, 60, and 61 address implementation details (46: resources for pedagogical courses, 48/49: practical training, 60/61: staff qualifications), which complement or support the target paragraph's focus on curriculum design and pedagogical practice.
paragraphs.para_en: 36. In the curricula, significant emphasis must be placed on the teaching of didactics, both from the perspective of active methods and the various disciplines, particularly the methodology of reading, writing, and introductory mathematics; this methodological instruction should be provided in close correlation with courses in psychology and with teaching practice.

paragraphs.para: 37. Les cours théoriques d'ordre pédagogique doivent être accompagnés de travaux de séminaire, de groupes de discussion, de recherches personnelles, etc. ; à cet effet, les établissements de formation pédagogique doivent être équipés en matériel d'enseignement et de recherche psychopédagogique et posséder une bibliothèque bien pourvue en revues d'éducation, en ouvrages de pédagogie, tant classiques que modernes, en ouvrages de référence et en manuels. — 163 —
paragraphs.think: The paragraph emphasizes foundational pedagogical structures (libraries, research materials) and teaching methods (seminars, discussion groups), justifying PEDAG_FOUND and PEDAG_METHO. Relations are identified based on shared focus on pedagogical training components, infrastructure, and collaborative practices.
paragraphs.para_en: Theoretical courses of a pedagogical nature must be accompanied by seminar work, discussion groups, individual research, etc.; for this purpose, teacher training institutions must be equipped with teaching and psycho-pedagogical research materials and have a well-stocked library containing educational journals, works on pedagogy—both classical and modern—reference books, and manuals.

paragraphs.para: 38. Dès que les circonstances s'y prêtent, il convient d'inclure, dans les plans d'études destinés aux élèves-maîtres, des cours facultatifs ou à option leur permettant d'approfondir des sujets plus en rapport avec leurs préférences ou leurs goûts personnels.
paragraphs.think: The tags 'CUR_CONTENT' and 'T_INI' are selected because the paragraph discusses curriculum content (optional courses) and initial teacher training (trainee teachers). Related paragraphs (48, 49, 51, 52, 60) address practical training, school environments, and mentorship, which are complementary aspects of teacher training. All relations are complemental with confidence 0.7, as they provide related but independent information about teacher education components.
paragraphs.para_en: 38. As soon as circumstances permit, optional or elective courses should be included in the curricula designed for trainee teachers, allowing them to deepen their knowledge in subjects more closely related to their personal preferences or interests.

paragraphs.para: 39. La formation pratique des élèves-maîtres constituant un des aspects essentiels de la préparation professionnelle du personnel enseignant primaire, il convient de consacrer aux stages une proportion importante du temps réservé aux études pédagogiques.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_INI (Initial education and training) and CUR_IMPL (Curriculum implementation) are selected because the paragraph emphasizes practical training as essential for initial teacher preparation and allocates time for internships within pedagogical studies. Related paragraphs 49, 50, 51, and 60 discuss complementary aspects (49: practical training components, 50: institutional control over training schools, 51: diversification of training settings, 60: role models for trainees), all supporting or refining the core idea of structured practical training.
paragraphs.para_en: 39. Practical training for student teachers, being one of the essential aspects of the professional preparation of primary teaching staff, should allocate a significant proportion of the time reserved for pedagogical studies to internships.

paragraphs.para: 40. La formation pratique des élèves-maîtres doit être conçue de façon à permettre à ceux-ci non seulement d'assister à des leçons-modèles et de s'initier personnellement et progressivement à la technique de l'enseignement et aux responsabilités d'une classe, mais aussi de vivre la vie de l'école dans toutes ses manifestations.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_INI (Initial teacher education) and M_FORM (Formal education) are selected because the paragraph emphasizes structured practical training and classroom responsibilities. Related paragraphs provide complementary details about training environments, community roles, and artistic development, all aligning with the target's focus on holistic teacher preparation.
paragraphs.para_en: 40. The practical training of student teachers must be designed to enable them not only to observe model lessons and to personally and progressively become acquainted with teaching techniques and classroom responsibilities, but also to experience school life in all its facets.

paragraphs.para: 41. Il est indispensable que les établissements assurant la formation des maîtres primaires aient sous leur contrôle une ou plusieurs écoles, si possible de type expérimental, où les élèves-maîtres puissent accomplir une partie de leurs stages pratiques.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_INI (Initial education and training) and ISC_1 (Primary education) are selected because the paragraph focuses on teacher training institutions and primary schools. Related paragraphs 51, 52, and 62 discuss practical training placements, diverse school environments, and post-graduation institutional contact, which complement the target paragraph's emphasis on structured practical training for primary teachers.
paragraphs.para_en: 41. It is essential that institutions responsible for the training of primary school teachers have under their control one or more schools, preferably of an experimental type, where student teachers can complete part of their practical training placements.

paragraphs.para: 42. La formation pratique des élèves-maîtres ne saurait se limiter à des stages dans des écoles d'application; il est désirable qu'ils aient l'expérience des écoles primaires de type ordinaire, où les difficultés (locaux, matériel, nombre d'élèves par classe, milieu, social, etc.) sont du même ordre que celles qu'ils rencontreront probablement dans les écoles où ils seront appelés à enseigner ultérieurement.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_INI (Initial education and training) and CUR_IMPL (Curriculum implementation) are selected because the paragraph emphasizes selecting qualified staff for teacher training institutions (initial education) and their role in shaping curriculum through modeling. For relations: Para 52 (43) discusses diverse training environments, complementing the target's focus on staff selection in training institutions. Para 62 (53) addresses ongoing institutional support, complementing the target's emphasis on staff selection as foundational to training.
paragraphs.para_en: 42. The practical training of trainee teachers should not be confined to placements in demonstration schools; it is desirable that they also gain experience in ordinary primary schools, where the challenges (premises, equipment, number of pupils per class, social environment, etc.) are of the same nature as those they will likely encounter in the schools where they will subsequently be called upon to teach.

paragraphs.para: 43. Les futurs maîtres doivent pouvoir s'exercer tout autant dans des écoles à maître unique que dans des établissements à plusieurs classes ; il y a intérêt aussi à ce qu'ils connaissent, dans la mesure du possible, des écoles situées dans des milieux différents.
paragraphs.think: The tag 'T_INI' (Teachers | Initial education and training) is selected because the paragraph discusses teacher training opportunities in diverse settings, which directly relates to initial education. For relations: Para 53 (44) complements by addressing adult education contexts, which are different environments for teacher training. Para 57 (48) complements by expanding on extracurricular activities as part of broader training experiences. Confidence scores reflect moderate to clear connections.
paragraphs.para_en: 43. Prospective teachers should have the opportunity to train both in single-teacher schools and in multi-class institutions; it is also advantageous for them to become acquainted, as far as possible, with schools located in different environments.

paragraphs.para: 44. Dans les pays où les maîtres primaires sont appelés à s'occuper d'éducation des adultes, par exemple dans les cours du soir, les élèves-maîtres devraient être initiés aux problèmes que pose ce genre d'éducation et avoir l'occasion de pratiquer dans des cours d'adultes ou d'éducation de base.
paragraphs.think: Tags POL_LL (Lifelong learning and adult education) and T_INI (Initial education and training) are selected because the paragraph explicitly discusses adult education and the training of student teachers. Related paragraphs 55, 57, 65, and 70 address teacher training, professional development, and community roles, which complement the target paragraph's focus on practical experience and teacher preparation.
paragraphs.para_en: 44. In countries where primary school teachers are expected to be involved in adult education, for example in evening classes, student teachers should be introduced to the issues raised by this type of education and have the opportunity to practice in adult or basic education courses.

paragraphs.para: 45. La formation pédagogique doit également comprendre des cours sur l'hygiène scolaire, sur les soins à donner à l'enfant et sur les précautions à prendre contre les maladies contagieuses et les épidémies; les maîtres primaires nommés dans des postes isolés doivent être au moins en mesure de s'occuper de leur santé et de celle de leur famille.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_INI (Initial education and training) and F_PE (Physical education and health) are selected because the paragraph explicitly mentions pedagogical training courses on hygiene, health care, and disease prevention. For relations: Para 55 complements the target by expanding on community hygiene and teacher training (confidence 0.9). Para 67 supports the target by emphasizing professional development structures (confidence 0.9). Para 69 complements by addressing rural teachers' needs (confidence 0.9).
paragraphs.para_en: 45. Pedagogical training must also include courses on school hygiene, on care to be given to the child, and on precautions to be taken against contagious diseases and epidemics; primary teachers appointed to isolated posts must at least be capable of taking care of their own health and that of their family.

paragraphs.para: 46. Etant donné le rôle social dévolu aux maîtres, ceux-ci doivent recevoir une préparation théorique et pratique afin de comprendre la place qui leur est réservée dans la vie de la communauté; pour cela, il leur faut s'initier à des activités telles que l'organisation des loisirs, la préparation de manifestations culturelles, l'amélioration des conditions d'hygiène de la population, le développement de la production locale, etc.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_INI (Initial education and training) and T_PDEV (Professional development) are selected because the paragraph emphasizes both theoretical/practical training for teachers' roles and their ongoing development. Related paragraphs provide complementary or supporting information about teacher training activities, professional development frameworks, and community engagement aspects.
paragraphs.para_en: 46. Given the social role assigned to teachers, they must receive both theoretical and practical training to understand their place within community life; to this end, they should be introduced to activities such as the organization of leisure, the preparation of cultural events, the improvement of public hygiene conditions, the development of local production, and so forth.

paragraphs.para: 47. Il convient de favoriser le développement du sens artistique des élèves-maîtres, si l'on veut que les écoles qui leur seront confiées deviennent à leur tour des foyers d'influence esthétique; pour cela, l'emplacement et —164 l'aménagement des établissements de formation pédagogique doivent être soigneusement choisis, et des manifestations musicales, théâtrales, littéraires et sportives organisées soit dans les établissements de formation pédagogique, soit dans les écoles primaires des environs,
paragraphs.think: Tags F_ARTS (artistic sensibility and cultural events), T_INI (teacher training institutions), ACT_EDUC (educators' development), and T_PDEV (professional development through events) are selected. Related paragraphs discuss extracurricular activities (57), humanistic culture (58), professional development organization (67), and facilities for development (69/70), all aligning with the target's focus on teacher training and cultural/educational activities.
paragraphs.para_en: 47. The development of the artistic sensibility of student teachers should be encouraged if the schools entrusted to them are to become centers of aesthetic influence in their turn; to achieve this, the location and layout of teacher training institutions must be carefully selected, and musical, theatrical, literary, and sporting events organized either within the teacher training institutions or in the nearby primary schools.

paragraphs.para: 48. Des occasions doivent être offertes aux élèves-maîtres de s'initier aux activités périscolaires (cantines et vestiaires scolaires, camps de vacances, mouvements de jeunesse, associations de parents et de maîtres, etc.).
paragraphs.think: Tags T_PDEV (Professional development) and CUR_CONTENT (Content and learning areas) are selected because the paragraph emphasizes opportunities for student teachers to engage in extracurricular activities as part of their professional growth. The related paragraphs (58, 67, 70, 69, 71) discuss professional development methods, institutional roles, and resources, which complement the target paragraph's focus on extracurricular involvement as a development tool.
paragraphs.para_en: Opportunities must be provided for student teachers to become involved in extracurricular activities (school canteens and changing rooms, holiday camps, youth movements, parent-teacher associations, etc.).

paragraphs.para: 49. Le comportement des élèves-maîtres dépend, pour une bonne part, de l'organisation des études, de l'esprit qui préside à l'enseignement et, le cas échéant, des conditions de logement et d'existence; la discipline doit done avoir un caractère libéral, se fonder sur le respect de la personnalité et favoriser le développement des possibilités individuelles; l'enseignement doit s'inspirer d'une culture largement humaine et contribuer à développer l'esprit civique et le sens des responsabilités.
paragraphs.think: Tags O_G (General academic orientation) and F_REL (Religion/moral education) are selected because the paragraph emphasizes humanistic culture, civic spirit, and respect for individuality, which align with moral education principles and general academic orientation. Para 59 complements the target by expanding on human relations and international understanding, while para 60 supports the idea of teacher role models in shaping student behavior.
paragraphs.para_en: 49. The behavior of student teachers largely depends on the organization of studies, the spirit underlying the teaching, and, where applicable, the conditions of housing and living; discipline must therefore be liberal in nature, based on respect for individuality and aimed at fostering the development of personal potential; teaching should draw on a broadly humanistic culture and contribute to nurturing civic spirit and a sense of responsibility.

paragraphs.para: 50. Un des plus grands problèmes que l'homme ait encore à résoudre étant celui de ses rapports avec ses semblables, il convient de cultiver, chez le futur maître primaire, les goûts, les attitudes, les connaissances et les aptitudes nécessaires pour développer de bonnes relations humaines (compréhension mutuelle, tolérance et solidarité) dans la classe, dans la famille et dans la communauté, tant locale et nationale qu'internationale ; les établissements de formation pédagogique devraient reconnaître l'importance capitale de ce problème et, par une instruction tant théorique que pratique, préparer les futurs maîtres à travailler en faveur de bonnes relations humaines et de la compréhension internationale.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_INI (Initial education and training) and PEDAG_OTHER (Other pedagogy related issue) are selected because the paragraph emphasizes teacher training institutions' role in cultivating human relations skills and providing theoretical/practical instruction. For relations: Para 60 complements by discussing staff selection for training institutions; Para 61 supports by highlighting qualifications needed for pedagogy professors; Para 62 complements by addressing ongoing institutional contact; Para 70 complements by suggesting collaborative professional development, which aligns with the target's focus on teacher preparation.
paragraphs.para_en: 50. One of the greatest problems that humanity still has to resolve is that of its relationships with others; it is therefore appropriate to cultivate in the future primary school teacher the tastes, attitudes, knowledge, and skills necessary to develop good human relations (mutual understanding, tolerance, and solidarity) within the classroom, the family, and the community, both local and national as well as international; teacher training institutions should recognize the paramount importance of this issue and, through both theoretical and practical instruction, prepare future teachers to work towards good human relations and international understanding.

paragraphs.para: 51. Il convient d'apporter une attention particulière au choix du personnel enseignant des établissements de formation pédagogique et des écoles d'application, puisque ses qualités humaines doivent en faire le prototype du maître proposé en exemple aux élèves-maîtres.
paragraphs.think: The paragraph focuses on selecting teaching staff for training institutions (T_INI). Para 61 supports this by detailing qualifications for pedagogy professors, reinforcing selection criteria. Para 62 complements by discussing ongoing institutional-teacher relationships, which aligns with maintaining standards post-selection.
paragraphs.para_en: 51. Particular attention should be given to the selection of teaching staff in teacher training institutions and practice schools, as their human qualities must make them the model teacher presented as an example to trainee teachers.

paragraphs.para: 52. Les professeurs de pédagogie et de psychologie doivent posséder de hautes qualifications théoriques et pratiques; quant aux professeurs chargés de l'enseignement des autres disciplines, ils doivent non seulement posséder à fond leur propre spécialité, mais connaître les aspects psychologiques, pédagogiques et sociaux de son enseignement.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_QUAL (qualification requirements for teachers) and PEDAG_FOUND (pedagogical foundations) are selected because the paragraph emphasizes qualifications for pedagogy/pyschology teachers and the need for understanding pedagogical/social aspects. Paragraph 63 is complemental as it addresses research organizations collaborating with training institutions to improve teaching methods, which aligns with the pedagogical foundations mentioned in the target paragraph.
paragraphs.para_en: 52. Professors of pedagogy and psychology must possess high theoretical and practical qualifications; as for professors responsible for teaching other disciplines, they must not only have a thorough command of their own specialty but also understand the psychological, pedagogical, and social aspects of its instruction.

paragraphs.para: 53. Le contact entre les établissements de formation pédagogique et les élèves-maîtres ne devrait pas cesser avec l'obtention par ceux-ci du diplôme de fin d'études normales: il convient donc de maintenir ce contact et de faire bénéficier les maîtres primaires en fonctions du rayonnement de ces établissements.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_INI (Initial education and training) and T_PDEV (Professional development) are selected because the paragraph emphasizes maintaining contact between teacher training institutions and teachers post-diploma (initial education) and enabling ongoing professional benefits. Related paragraphs discuss complementary aspects like research organizations (63), professional development initiatives (64), in-service training (66), subsidies for development (68), facilities for development (69), and collaborative groups (70), all aligning with the theme of teacher development.
paragraphs.para_en: 53. The contact between the teacher training institutions and the trainee teachers should not cease upon their obtaining the normal school diploma; therefore, it is necessary to maintain this contact and to enable practicing primary school teachers to benefit from the influence of these institutions.

paragraphs.para: 54. Des organismes de recherches psychologiques et pédagogiques doivent être constitués pour faciliter — en collaboration avec les établissements de formation pédagogique et, le cas échéant, avec leurs écoles annexes et d'application ou toutes autres écoles primaires — le perfectionnement constant des méthodes et l'amélioration des instruments de travail nécessaires aux maîtres primaires. — 165 —
paragraphs.think: The paragraph focuses on establishing research organizations to improve teaching methods and tools through collaboration with training institutions, which directly relates to professional development (T_PDEV). Related paragraphs discuss specific aspects of professional development (e.g., funding, organizational roles, rural teachers), which are complemental or modifying to the target paragraph's general framework.
paragraphs.para_en: 54. Psychological and pedagogical research organizations must be established to facilitate — in collaboration with teacher training institutions and, where applicable, with their affiliated and practice schools or any other primary schools — the continuous improvement of methods and the enhancement of work tools necessary for primary school teachers.

paragraphs.para: PERFECTIONNEMENT DES MAÎTRES PRIMAIRES EN FONCTIONS 55. Il convient de prendre toutes mesures pour que les maîtres primaires en fonctions puissent se perfectionner tout au long de leur carrière, afin de se tenir au courant des théories nouvelles et des nouvelles techniques.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_PDEV and PEDAG_LEARN are selected because the paragraph explicitly discusses professional development (T_PDEV) and professional learning communities (PEDAG_LEARN) through references to staying informed about new theories/techniques. Related paragraphs provide supporting details (65, 67), complementary context (66, 69, 70), or modifying conditions (68) about professional development systems, incentives, and organizational responsibilities.
paragraphs.para_en: PROFESSIONAL DEVELOPMENT OF ACTIVE PRIMARY SCHOOL TEACHERS 55. All necessary measures should be taken to ensure that active primary school teachers can pursue professional development throughout their careers, in order to stay informed about new theories and techniques.

paragraphs.para: 56. L'organisation d'un système de perfectionnement professionnel s'avère surtout nécessaire pour les maîtres primaires qui ont reçu une formation accélérée, donc sommaire et incomplète, et pour ceux qui ont été nommés sans posséder tous les titres habituellement requis.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_PDEV (professional development) is directly mentioned in the text. T_QUAL (qualification) applies because the paragraph discusses teachers lacking required qualifications. ISC_1 (primary education) is relevant as the focus is on primary school teachers. Related paragraphs discuss professional development systems (66, 67, 69, 70) and funding (68), which are all connected to the need for teacher development frameworks.
paragraphs.para_en: 56. The organization of a system for professional development proves to be especially necessary for primary school teachers who have received accelerated training, which is therefore brief and incomplete, as well as for those who have been appointed without possessing all the usual qualifications.

paragraphs.para: 57. Outre l'accroissement d'efficacité et l'encouragement moral que le personnel enseignant primaire peut tirer des cours de perfectionnement, ceux-ci doivent permettre, là où le taux de rétribution est fonction des titres et qualifications, d'augmenter les chances d'avancement de quiconque les a suivis avec profit.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_QUAL and T_PDEV are selected because the paragraph focuses on professional development (T_PDEV) and qualification-based remuneration (T_QUAL). Related paragraphs discuss complementary aspects: 67 (organizing professional development), 69 (facilities for development), 70 (collaborative learning groups), and 71 (study trips as development tools). All relations are complemental with high confidence as they expand on professional development mechanisms.
paragraphs.para_en: 57. In addition to the increased efficiency and morale that primary teaching staff may derive from in-service training courses, these courses must, where remuneration depends on qualifications and credentials, enhance the opportunities for advancement of anyone who has successfully completed them.

paragraphs.para: 58. Quels que soient les moyens employés pour contribuer au perfectionnement du personnel enseignant primaire (conférences, leçons-modèles, groupes de discussion, stages d'études, cours de vacances, cours par correspondance, émissions radiophoniques, etc.), un rôle prépondérant doit revenir, dans l'organisation de ces manifestations, à l'inspection scolaire, à la direction et au corps enseignant des établissements de formation pédagogique, et aux groupements ou associations de personnel enseignant primaire.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_PDEV (Professional development) and PEDAG_LEARN (Professional learning communities) are selected because the paragraph emphasizes methods like discussion groups and model lessons for teacher development. Related paragraphs 68-71 discuss complementary aspects: 68 supports role of associations, 69 adds support mechanisms, 70 expands on group activities, and 71 provides specific examples of professional development methods.
paragraphs.para_en: 58. Regardless of the means employed to contribute to the professional development of primary teaching staff (lectures, model lessons, discussion groups, study internships, holiday courses, correspondence courses, radio broadcasts, etc.), a predominant role in organizing these activities must be assigned to the school inspection, the administration and teaching staff of teacher training institutions, and associations or groups of primary teaching personnel.

paragraphs.para: 59. Lorsque les autorités scolaires ne prennent pas à leur charge l'organisation du perfectionnement des maitres primaires, des subventions doivent être accordées aux associations de personnel enseignant ou autres institutions et groupements capables de mener à bien cette tâche.
paragraphs.think: The paragraph focuses on professional development (T_PDEV) of primary school teachers and the need for subsidies when authorities fail to provide it. Paragraph 69 discusses granting facilities for professional development, directly complementing the target paragraph's subsidy idea. Paragraph 70 mentions forming groups for educational problem-solving, which aligns with professional development initiatives, making it complemental but with slightly lower confidence as it addresses a different method.
paragraphs.para_en: 59. When the educational authorities do not assume responsibility for organizing the professional development of primary school teachers, subsidies must be granted to teachers' associations or other institutions and groups capable of successfully carrying out this task.

paragraphs.para: 60. Les plus grandes facilités (congés, allocations, etc.) doivent être accordées aux maîtres primaires pour qu'ils puissent bénéficier des initiatives prises en vue de leur perfectionnement professionnel; ces facilités s'avèrent encore plus nécessaires lorsqu'il s'agit du perfectionnement des maitres qui exercent dans les campagnes sans posséder tous les titres requis.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_PDEV (professional development) and T_QUAL (qualification) are selected because the paragraph emphasizes facilities for professional development and addresses teachers lacking required qualifications. Paragraph 70 complements the target by discussing collaborative professional development methods, while paragraph 71 supports the target by proposing study trips and scholarships as professional development tools.
paragraphs.para_en: The greatest facilities (leave, allowances, etc.) must be granted to primary school teachers so that they can benefit from initiatives aimed at their professional development; these facilities are even more necessary when it concerns the improvement of teachers working in rural areas who do not possess all the required qualifications.

paragraphs.para: 61. Outre les initiatives prises par les autorités scolaires ou par d'autres institutions et groupements en vue du perfectionnement des maîtres primaires, il y a lieu d'encourager ces derniers à constituer des groupes de travail ou des cercles d'étude pour examiner en commun les problèmes éducatifs, tant théoriques que pratiques, qui les concernent plus spécialement.
paragraphs.think: Tags T_PDEV (Professional development) and PEDAG_LEARN (Professional learning communities) are selected because the paragraph emphasizes collaborative problem-solving and professional growth through study groups. Paragraph 71 is complemental as it discusses additional professional development methods (study trips/scholarships) that align with the target paragraph's focus on teacher improvement.
paragraphs.para_en: 61. In addition to the initiatives taken by the school authorities or by other institutions and groups aimed at the professional development of primary school teachers, it is necessary to encourage the latter to form working groups or study circles to jointly examine educational problems, both theoretical and practical, that particularly concern them.

paragraphs.para: 62. Les voyages d'étude individuels ou collectifs, tant dans le pays qu'à l'étranger, doivent être considérés comme un des moyens les plus efficaces pour relever le niveau professionnel des maîtres, élargir leur vision des problèmes scolaires et les inciter à améliorer leurs méthodes; c'est pourquoi un nombre suffisant de bourses doivent être octroyées à des maîtres primaires, qui feront ensuite bénéficier leurs collègues de l'expérience acquise au cours de ces voyages d'étude. — 168 —
